title: RegPM
description: This is a registration plugin called RegPM.
body:
The plugin is written entirely by a neural network, enjoy using it!

This is a registration plugin called RegPM.
It has 3 languages: Russian, English, and German, but you can add your own! 

The registration commands are the same, but the command for changing the password is /rpm change oldpassword newpassword.

Admin commands:
/rpm - list of commands
/rpm disconnect/ disconnectip nickname - disables the account/ip address!
!Clarification! If you try to bypass the IP block by changing the IP on an already registered account, it won't work. You'll need to create a new account with a new IP address.
/rpm activ/activip nickname - restores the account to functionality.
/rpm checkip nickname - checks the IP address of the account.
/rpm listbanned - checks the list of blocked accounts.
/rpm setlimit number - sets the new account limit (default is 3).
/rpm reload - reloads the plugin configuration.

 Please forgive me if the translation is incorrect!![Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b1ad56fca0a5ada7b6ca3d4249fa54e79fc6668.png)
